title: Flower Imperial Concubine Han Yan
content:
Han Yan
 is one of the eight Imperial Concubines of the Rain Celestial Emperor 
Qing Lin
.

Appearance
[
]

She was very beautiful, almost to a demonic level. Even though 
Liu Mei
 didn’t lose to her in appearance, she lacked an unspeakable feeling. She was like a flower of the world that would bloom and wither along with the world.

She was said to be above the rest of Qing Lin's seven concubines.

Background
[
]

She was only Imperial Concubines who did not betray Qing Lin.

History
[
]

She stopped 
Wang Lin
 and company from entering the fourth minor celestial cave in the East Demon Spirit Sea. She is far stronger than even the likes of 
Qing Shui
 and 
Master Flamespark
.

She only allowed Wang Lin to enter after he used the Stop Spell and showed her 
Qing Shuang
's corpse.
